title: Leucostegia tenera
taxonomy: Leucostegia tenera is a species of fern in the family Hypodematiaceae. This species is a type of epiphytic fern, which grows on other plants. The classification of Leucostegia tenera places it within the kingdom Plantae, phylum Pteridophyta, and class Polypodiopsida. It is also known as a member of the order Polypodiales and family Hypodematiaceae. Leucostegia tenera is considered an endemic species, found primarily in the tropical regions of Asia.
